## Per-Skill Detail

### /awareness-ledger
- **Description:** Institutional memory for your project. Commands: record, consult, review. Usage: /awareness-ledger [command] [args]
- **When to use:** Recording incidents, decisions, patterns, and flows so diagnostic findings persist across sessions; consulting historical context before planning changes.
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `record` — Create a new ledger record (INC/DEC/PAT/FLW)
  - `consult` — Query ledger for relevant records, spawn agents
  - `review` — Audit ledger health: stale entries, missing links, stats
- **Triggers:** institutional memory, incidents, decisions, patterns, flows, ledger
- **Path:** .claude/skills/awareness-ledger/SKILL.md

### /editor-tools
- **Description:** Tmux and Ranger configuration, plugin management, and workflows for YADRLite.
- **When to use:** Editing tmux.conf, managing tmux plugins, working with Ranger file-manager configuration.
- **Triggers:** tmux, ranger, plugin management, workflows, yadrlite
- **Path:** .claude/skills/editor-tools/SKILL.md

### /emacs-config
- **Description:** Emacs configuration with Evil mode, DAP debugging, and project search workflows for YADRLite.
- **When to use:** Editing emacs.init, configuring Evil mode bindings, DAP/PHP debugging workflows, project search shortcuts.
- **Triggers:** emacs, evil mode, dap debugging, project search, yadrlite
- **Path:** .claude/skills/emacs-config/SKILL.md

### /lazyvim
- **Description:** LazyVim/Neovim configuration architecture, plugin management, and PHP development workflows for YADRLite.
- **When to use:** Modifying LazyVim plugins under workstation/nvim/lua/, configuring Intelephense LSP, PHP debug adapter, Mason packages.
- **Triggers:** lazyvim, neovim, plugin management, php development, yadrlite
- **Path:** .claude/skills/lazyvim/SKILL.md

### /self-heal
- **Description:** Ambient friction detection and surgical skill correction. Embeds into all skills. Triggers at task resolution when skill instructions caused friction.
- **When to use:** Reviewing observer embedding across skills and friction-event history; does not run on demand otherwise — surfaces automatically at task resolution.
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `review` — Audit which skills embed the Self-Heal Observer and tally per-skill friction events
- **Triggers:** friction detection, skill correction, task resolution
- **Path:** .claude/skills/self-heal/SKILL.md

### /vim-config
- **Description:** Vim configuration with Vim-Plug plugin management, tag navigation, search, and Xdebug debugging for YADRLite.
- **When to use:** Editing vimrc or vim/settings/*.vim, managing Vim-Plug plugins, tag/search workflows, Xdebug configuration.
- **Triggers:** vim, vim-plug, tag navigation, search, xdebug debugging, yadrlite
- **Path:** .claude/skills/vim-config/SKILL.md

### /yadrlite-setup
- **Description:** YADRLite installation, tools, ASDF languages, migrations, update, uninstall, and Arch workstation setup commands.
